19/5 冰島 （第一日）
~18:00到市區
City walk

20/5 Grand Golden Circle 7890ISK

- Geysir geothermal area
- Gullfoss waterfall
- Þingvellir National Park
- Kerið volcanic crater (entrance fee included)

21/5 South Shore Adventure 9990ISK

- Sólheimajökull
- Vík
- Reynisfjara
- Reynisdrangar
- Skógafoss
- Seljalandsfoss

22/5 Whales & Puffins 14185ISK

23/5 Experience the magic of Snæfellsnes 15990ISK

24/5 翻倫敦

住宿 HKD1422 /~3000
